basic_details.job_title: PJTSAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University
basic_details.short_information: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the PJTSAU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters Degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Genetic Resources/Genetics/Plant Biotechnology, UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or national level examination for Master Degree
qualification.details: Masters Degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Genetic Resources/Genetics/Plant Biotechnology and 2 years experience on research project post qualification. Must have UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or the selection process for the Master Degree through a national level examination conducted by Central Govt. Department and their agency and institution. Desirable qualification: 1-2 years research experience of conducting field trials, data collection and analysis, basic molecular plant biotechnology techniques/writing skills/crossing and evaluation of genotypes along with computer knowledge which is must.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the PJTSAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University recruitment is Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 37000 Per Month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Masters Degree in Plant Breeding/Genetics and Plant Breeding/Genetic Resources/Genetics/Plant Biotechnology, along with UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the date of the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Junior Research Fellow position will be held on 16 June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview scheduled to take place?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to take place at the PJTSAU office in Hyderabad, Telangana.
